name: RPM - Modern Military Playermodels REMASTERED (RAGDOLL UPDATE)
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: A Pack of 21st century Military Playermodels! Includes: American, Russian, Chinese, British, French, German, Ukrainian, Israeli, Japanese, South Korean, North Korean, Turkish, Greek, Italian, Serbian, Slovakian, Czech, Croatian, Hungairan, Romanian, Finnish, Norwegian, Swedish, Australian, Austrian, Spanish, Canadian, Mexican, Polish, Brazilian troopers as well as PMC-s and Insurgents. NOW INCLUDES RAGDOLLS TOO!!! “From the foggy Korean DMZ to the deserts of North Africa... from the Arctic Circle to the war-torn streets of Eastern Europe… the world is on fire—choose your side.”
